name: Hidden Springs Pickleball
description: Hidden Springs Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Spicer, MN. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: Kandiyohi County Area Family YMCA
description: Kandiyohi County Area Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Willmar, MN. There are 5 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Sperry Park
description: Sperry Park is a place to play pickleball in Willmar, MN. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights. Reservations are not available.
address: North Hwy 71 and Homewood Ave Willmar

name: Spicer Tennis Courts
description: Spicer Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Spicer, MN. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Willmar City Auditorium
description: Willmar City Auditorium is a place to play pickleball in Willmar, MN. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Willmar Civic Center
description: Willmar Civic Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Willmar, MN. There are 8 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms. Reservations are available.
